materials.name: Carpet 011
materials.author: ambientCG
materials.changes: Maps 1K recompressed as WebP; AO and roughness packed into R/G channels.

materials.name: Backrooms office carpet albedo
materials.author: Generated specifically for Threshold Zero with OpenAI image generation
materials.changes: Generated as a flat tileable albedo and encoded as quality-82 WebP. It reuses the CC0 Carpet 011 normal and ARM maps.
materials.generationPrompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: seamless PBR game texture, carpet albedo only
Primary request: transform the supplied carpet color texture into a realistic old commercial office carpet suitable for Backrooms Level 0. Keep the fine dense loop-pile textile weave but remove the harsh gold-and-white speckling and reduce visual noise.
Composition: perfectly flat orthographic surface texture, uniform coverage edge to edge, seamless/tileable on all four edges, no perspective and no directional lighting baked into the texture.
Color palette: warm faded beige with a restrained sickly yellow/olive cast, approximately light tan rather than brown or saturated gold. Subtle irregular aging and extremely faint damp tonal variation only.
Constraints: preserve believable high-frequency fibers; albedo/color texture only; no shadows, highlights, ambient occlusion, normal-map appearance, objects, seams, borders, text, watermark, or vignette. The output must tile without obvious repetition.

materials.name: Painted Plaster 017
materials.author: ambientCG
materials.changes: Maps 1K recompressed as WebP; roughness packed into the G channel.

materials.name: Office Ceiling 001
materials.author: ambientCG
materials.changes: Maps 1K recompressed as WebP; AO and roughness packed into R/G channels.

materials.name: Backrooms wallpaper pattern
materials.author: Generated specifically for Threshold Zero with OpenAI image generation
materials.changes: Downscaled to 1024 px and encoded as WebP.
materials.generationPrompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: tileable game texture for a professional WebGL liminal-horror environment
Primary request: seamless vintage mono-yellow office wallpaper from the late 1980s, subtle repeating vertical fleur-and-chevron pattern, faded nicotine-yellow and muted olive tones, realistic woven paper fibers, gentle age variation and extremely subtle water discoloration
Style/medium: orthographic flat diffuse/albedo texture scan, photorealistic material reference, evenly lit
Composition/framing: perfectly front-facing square texture, pattern aligned vertically, edge-to-edge
Lighting/mood: neutral flat diffuse lighting with no directional shadows or highlights
Constraints: must tile seamlessly on all four edges; uniform texel scale; no perspective; no wall edges; no baseboard; no room; no holes; no objects; no text; no logos; no watermark; no strong focal stain; avoid baked shadows and avoid high contrast
